message:
app: PI_TEST_MODE for deterministic system prompt timestamps/cwd

When PI_TEST_MODE environment variable is set, replace dynamic values
in the system prompt with deterministic placeholders:
- Current date/time → <TIMESTAMP>
- Current working directory → <CWD>

This enables reproducible test snapshots and VCR cassette matching
where system prompt content would otherwise differ between runs due
to timestamps and absolute paths.

Usage: Set PI_TEST_MODE=1 (or any value) before running tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
